/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AMD_GUI.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AMD_GUI.dir/AMD_GUI_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMD_GUI.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/AMD_GUI  /usr/lib64/libQt5Network.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib64/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib64/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.18 /usr/lib64/libQt5Core.so.5.15.18
